text: The consignee of a vessel is liable to a pilot for the pilotage of the vessel.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.064 — Consignee Liability for Pilot Services

The consignee of a vessel is liable to a pilot for the pilotage of the vessel.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The consignee of a vessel is liable to a pilot for the pilotage of the vessel.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
